{{Infobox artifact
| name = Midnight Rain
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Midnight Rain]] is an oversized bow made from petrified wood with the blood of a [[Herald]] [[sword]] artist.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Midnight Rain]]'s [[binding]] comes from an [[Archlord]]-level lizard.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Midnight Rain]] can be used to draw forth a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Midnight Rain]] is a weapon summoned by [[Yan Shoumei]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
